steps.t: Orc-guarded lockboxes can be found in Hîs-urdan in southern Thinglad. You should examine the contents of the lockboxes, but first you will likely need…

Renfaer, the scout of southern Thinglad, awaits you at his watch-post. You should bring the treasure you gathered to Renfaer.
